task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the Subsurface application and accessed the Dive Planner tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Subsurface application window is visible with the 'Dive Planner' or 'Plan Dive' interface active.

task_completion.description: Verify the breathing gas is set to Air (21% O2) in the planner.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The gas selection dropdown or input field in the dive planner shows 'Air' or '21%' O2.

task_completion.description: Verify the dive plan includes a waypoint or setting for a maximum depth of 18 meters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The planner's depth input field or waypoint table shows '18' (meters).

task_completion.description: Verify the dive plan includes a bottom time of 40 minutes at the target depth.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The planner's duration input field or waypoint table shows '40' (minutes) associated with the 18m depth.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saves the newly created dive plan to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file explorer window is visible with the file path '/home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf' entered, or a confirmation showing the file was saved to this location.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Subsurface GUI to plan the dive, rather than writing an XML/SSRF file directly via terminal or text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Subsurface application window, not just a terminal or text editor like nano/vim.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is interacting with the actual Subsurface application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window should have the standard Subsurface UI elements (menu bar, dive list, profile graph, etc.).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not manually edit the .ssrf XML file to bypass the planner.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like gedit, nano, vim) open with XML code containing the target dive parameters.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a dive plan with the following specific parameters: Maximum depth of 18.0 meters, bottom time of 40.0 minutes, and breathing gas set to 'air' (21% O2). The final dive plan must be saved to the exact path: /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf.
